info.name: ISO-Robot - API Verification
info.description:
# ISO Robot API v1

**Base URL:** `{{baseUrl}}` → must be `http://localhost:8000/api/v1`

## Quick start
1. Run **01 Auth → Login (Analyst)**
2. Run folders **02 → 08** in order
3. Run **09 Risk Tagging** then **10 Risk Owner Assignment** to tag and assign the register
4. While jobs run, re-hit **11 Fetch Latest Data** to see DB rows grow
5. Use **Poll job** requests until `status` = `completed`

## End-to-end flow
```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Login] --> B[Upload / list org documents]
    B --> C[Extract controls - JOB]
    C --> D[GET controls by orgId]
    D --> E[Issues from controls - JOB]
    E --> F[Classify issues - JOB]
    F --> G[PESTEL / SWOT / TVRA aggregate]
    G --> H[Risk discovery - JOB]
    H --> I[Risk scoring - JOB]
    I --> J[GET risk assessment]
    J --> K[Upload selected risks]
    K --> L[Risk tagging - JOB]
    L --> M[Apply selected tags]
    M --> N[Owner assignment - JOB]
    N --> O[Apply selected assignments]
```

## Authentication
| Route | Auth |
|-------|------|
| `POST /auth/login`, `POST /auth/register`, `GET /health` | **None** |
| Everything else | `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` |

Login saves `token` + `clientOrgId` to collection variables.

## Error format (all endpoints)
```json
{ "detail": "Human message", "code": "ERROR_CODE" }
```

| HTTP | code | Meaning |
|------|------|---------|
| 401 | UNAUTHORIZED | Missing/invalid Bearer header |
| 401 | SESSION_INVALID | Expired or bad JWT |
| 401 | AUTH_FAILED | Wrong username/password |
| 403 | FORBIDDEN | Org mismatch or not admin |
| 404 | not_found | Resource missing |
| 404 | CLIENT_ORG_NOT_FOUND | Bad org id |
| 409 | DUPLICATE_RECORD | Slug/email taken |
| 422 | validation_error | Bad request body |

## Job system
Long work runs in **background jobs**. Pattern:

1. **Start** → POST returns `{ "id", "type", "status": "pending", ... }`
2. **Poll** → `GET /jobs/{jobId}` until `completed` or `failed`
3. **Fetch data** → GET list endpoints (controls, issues) — rows appear while job runs

| Job type | Started by | What it does |
|----------|------------|--------------|
| `extract_controls` | `/control-documents/extract/{orgId}` | Azure DI + LLM → `controls` table |
| `issues_from_controls` | `/issues/from-controls` | LLM synthesizes issues from controls |
| `classify_issues` | `/issues/classify` or auto after step above | LLM/heuristic → `issue_classifications` |
| `risk_discovery` | `/risk-discovery/run` | BM25 + LLM → `candidate_risks` |
| `score_risks` | `/risk-scoring/run` | LLM + matrix → `risk_assessments` |
| `risk_tagging` | `/risk-tagging/run` | Catalog matching + LLM → `risk_tags` (Stage 09) |
| `risk_owner_assignment` | `/risk-assignments/run` | Weighted owner matching → `risk_assignments` (Stage 10) |

Job status values: `pending` → `running` → `completed` | `failed` (see `error` field)

request.description:
## Response 200
`{ "status": "ok" }` — no auth.

## Response 200
```json
{ "status": "ok" }
```
No auth required.

item.name: 01 Auth

request.description:
## Purpose
Authenticate analyst user. **Run first.** Public — no Bearer token.

## Request
```json
{ "username": "email", "password": "..." }
```

## Response 200
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "message": "Login successful",
  "data": {
    "access_token": "<JWT>",
    "user_id": "uuid",
    "client_org_id": "uuid",
    "client_org_name": "...",
    "tenant_id": "...",
    "folders": { "control_documents_folder": "...", ... },
    "roles": ["analyst"]
  }
}
```

## Other responses
| Status | code |
|--------|------|
| 401 | AUTH_FAILED |
| 403 | UNAUTHORIZED (disabled account) |
| 404 | CLIENT_ORG_NOT_FOUND |

## Flow
Saves `token` + `clientOrgId` to collection variables.

## Purpose

Admin login for org creation and cross-org ops.

Same request/response shape as Analyst login.

## Other responses

401 AUTH_FAILED · 403 disabled · 404 org not found

## Purpose
Create user (demo/admin). Public.

## Response 200
ApiResponse with UserResponse in `data`.
409 DUPLICATE_RECORD if email exists.

item.description: **Step 1.** Login is public. Saves `token` + `clientOrgId`. All later folders need Bearer token.

item.name: 02 Org & Control Documents

request.description:
## Purpose
Multipart upload of PDF/DOCX/XLSX/TXT to org folder.

## Form fields
`client_org_id`, `document_type`, `file`

## Response 200
ApiResponse with new ControlDocumentResponse in `data`.
400 FILE_UPLOAD_FAILED · 404 CLIENT_ORG_NOT_FOUND

## Response 200
ApiResponse: `{ organisations: [OrgResponse] }`

body.raw:
{
    "client_org_id": "{{clientOrgId}}",
    "business_demography": {
        "industry": "Sports Governance",
        "sub_industry": "Olympic movement, athlete development, major sports event hosting and coordination",
        "employee_count": "610",
        "annual_revenue": null,
        "headquarters_country": "Qatar ",
        "headquarters_city": "Doha",
        "ownership_type": "Public Sports Institution",
        "regulatory_region": "GCC",
        "website": "www.olympic.qa",
        "functions": [
            "Sport sector, athlete services, federation support",
            "Sport events and major-event coordination",
            "Marketing, communications and international cooperation",
            "Support services: HR, finance, procurement, logistics, IT",
            "Strategy, sustainability, legal, audit, executive offices"
        ],
        "locations": [],
        "processes": [],
        "regulatory_frameworks": [],
        "notes": null
    }
}

request.description:
## Purpose
Update org business profile (API 3).

## Response 200

## Response 200

404 VALIDATION_ERROR if not set.

item.description: **Step 2.** Upload/list PDFs for the org before extraction.

item.name: 03 Extract Controls

exec: const b=pm.response.json(); const id=b.id||(b.data&&b.data.job_id); if(id) pm.collectionVariables.set('jobId',id);

request.description:
## Purpose

Extract controls from all org PDFs.

### Job behavior

- Returns immediately with `status: pending`
    
- Worker runs in background via FastAPI BackgroundTasks
    
- Poll **`GET /jobs/{{jobId}}`** until done
    
- Re-fetch list endpoints in **09 Fetch Latest Data** while running
    

## Job type

`extract_controls`

## Response 200

``` json
{
  "status": "accepted",
  "data": { "job_id": "uuid", "documents_queued": 2, "folder": "...", "processing_status": "in_progress" }
}

 ```

400 VALIDATION_ERROR (no docs) · 404 CLIENT_ORG_NOT_FOUND

## Then

Poll job → **List controls** (09 or 03)

## Purpose

Check background job progress.

## Response 200

``` json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "type": "extract_controls",
  "status": "pending|running|completed|failed",
  "payload": {},
  "error": null,
  "created_at": "...",
  "updated_at": "..."
}

 ```

404 not_found

Repeat until `completed` or `failed`.

## Purpose
**Fetch latest controls** for org — re-run anytime; list grows during extract job.

## Query
`client_org_id`, `document_id` (optional), `limit`, `offset`

## Response 200
Array of:
```json
{ "id", "document_id", "client_org_id", "control_text", "section_ref", "framework", "source_page", "created_at" }
```

item.description:
**Step 3.** Start extract job → poll → list controls.

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  Client->>API: POST extract/{orgId}
  API-->>Client: job_id
  loop until completed
    Client->>API: GET /jobs/{id}
    Client->>API: GET /controls?client_org_id=
  end
```

item.name: 04 Issues

exec: const b=pm.response.json(); const id=b.id||(b.data&&b.data.job_id); if(id) pm.collectionVariables.set('jobId',id);

request.description:
## Purpose
LLM synthesizes issues from extracted controls.

### Job behavior
- Returns immediately with `status: pending`
- Worker runs in background via FastAPI BackgroundTasks
- Poll **`GET /jobs/{{jobId}}`** until done
- Re-fetch list endpoints in **09 Fetch Latest Data** while running

## Job type
`issues_from_controls`

## Request
```json
{
  "document_id": "uuid",
  "replace_existing": true,
  "classify_after": true,
  "sector_hint": null,
  "region_hint": null
}
```

If `classify_after: true`, spawns separate `classify_issues` job.

## Response 200
JobResponse

## Purpose
Check background job progress.

## Response 200
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "type": "extract_controls",
  "status": "pending|running|completed|failed",
  "payload": {},
  "error": null,
  "created_at": "...",
  "updated_at": "..."
}
```
404 not_found

Repeat until `completed` or `failed`.

## Purpose
Fetch latest issues — re-run while classify job runs.

## Response 200
Array of IssueListItem with optional embedded `classification`.

Fields: `id`, `title`, `body`, `client_org_id`, `issue_scope`, `origin`, `control_ids`, ...

## Response 200
Single IssueListItem.
404 not_found

exec: const b=pm.response.json(); const id=b.id||(b.data&&b.data.job_id); if(id) pm.collectionVariables.set('jobId',id);

request.description:
## Purpose
Run LLM/heuristic classification → feeds PESTEL charts.

### Job behavior
- Returns immediately with `status: pending`
- Worker runs in background via FastAPI BackgroundTasks
- Poll **`GET /jobs/{{jobId}}`** until done
- Re-fetch list endpoints in **09 Fetch Latest Data** while running

## Job type
`classify_issues`

## Request
`issue_ids` optional — omit to classify all unclassified.

## Response 200
JobResponse

## Purpose
Check background job progress.

## Response 200
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "type": "extract_controls",
  "status": "pending|running|completed|failed",
  "payload": {},
  "error": null,
  "created_at": "...",
  "updated_at": "..."
}
```
404 not_found

Repeat until `completed` or `failed`.

## Response 200
```json
{
  "issue_id": "...",
  "classification": { "labels": [...], "pestel": ... },
  "model_version": "...",
  "created_at": "..."
}
```
404 not_found (issue or no classification yet)

## Response 200
```json
{ "status": "success", "data": { "client_org_id", "issues", "documents" } }
```

item.description:
**Step 4.** Issues from controls → classify → list.

`classify_after:true` auto-spawns classify job.

item.name: 05 Charts (PESTEL / SWOT / TVRA)

request.description:
## Purpose
Chart data for Classifications UI — PESTEL, SWOT, TVRA, Geo/Global.

## Query
`issue_id` (optional — focus one issue), `industry`, `region` (display labels)

## Response 200
```json
{
  "focused_issue": { "id", "title", "has_classification" },
  "counts": { "pestel", "swot", "tvra", "geo_global" },
  "summary": { "sources", "classified", "signals", "llm", "heuristic", "industry", "region" },
  "agents": [...],
  "pestel": { "Political": [...], "Economic": [...], ... },
  "swot": { "strengths", "weaknesses", "opportunities", "threats" },
  "tvra": [ { "type": "threat|vulnerability", "likelihood", "impact", ... } ],
  "geo_global": { "geopolitical", "enforcement", "best_practice", "global_risk" }
}
```

Run after classify job completes.

## Response 200
```json
{ "documents", "controls", "issues", "candidate_risks", "risk_library", "jobs_running" }
```
Global DB counts.

item.description:
**Step 5.** Chart/analytics data. Requires classified issues.

PESTEL = Political/Economic/Social/Technological/Environmental/Legal

item.name: 06 Risk Discovery

request.description:
## Purpose
One-time load from POC xlsx → `risk_library` table.

## Response 200
```json
{ "entries": 81, "csv_path": "..." }
```
Sync — not a job.

## Response 200
Array of RiskLibraryListItem.

exec: const b=pm.response.json(); const id=b.id||(b.data&&b.data.job_id); if(id) pm.collectionVariables.set('jobId',id);

request.description:
## Purpose
BM25 + LLM: match issues → risk library → candidate_risks.

### Job behavior
- Returns immediately with `status: pending`
- Worker runs in background via FastAPI BackgroundTasks
- Poll **`GET /jobs/{{jobId}}`** until done
- Re-fetch list endpoints in **09 Fetch Latest Data** while running

## Job type
`risk_discovery`

## Response 200
JobResponse

## Purpose
Check background job progress.

## Response 200
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "type": "extract_controls",
  "status": "pending|running|completed|failed",
  "payload": {},
  "error": null,
  "created_at": "...",
  "updated_at": "..."
}
```
404 not_found

Repeat until `completed` or `failed`.

## Response 200
Array of CandidateRiskListItem: `id`, `title`, `match_status`, `library_risk_id`, `bm25_score`, `issue_ids`, ...

## Response 200
DiscoveryExportResponse: documents_summary, controls, issues, candidate_risks, risk_library_matches, risk_library.

item.description: **Step 6.** Seed library (once) → discovery job → candidate risks.

item.name: 07 Risk Scoring

exec: const b=pm.response.json(); const id=b.id||(b.data&&b.data.job_id); if(id) pm.collectionVariables.set('jobId',id);

request.description:
## Purpose
LLM judgment + deterministic matrix → inherent/residual risk.

### Job behavior
- Returns immediately with `status: pending`
- Worker runs in background via FastAPI BackgroundTasks
- Poll **`GET /jobs/{{jobId}}`** until done
- Re-fetch list endpoints in **09 Fetch Latest Data** while running

## Job type
`score_risks`

## Request
```json
{ "issue_ids": ["uuid"], "controls": ["optional control text"] }
```

## Response 200
JobResponse
403 FORBIDDEN if issue not in user's org

## Purpose
Check background job progress.

## Response 200
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "type": "extract_controls",
  "status": "pending|running|completed|failed",
  "payload": {},
  "error": null,
  "created_at": "...",
  "updated_at": "..."
}
```
404 not_found

Repeat until `completed` or `failed`.

## Purpose
Latest scored assessment for issue (after score_risks job).

## Response 200
```json
{
  "issue_id": "...",
  "model_version": "...",
  "created_at": "...",
  "assessment": {
    "likelihood", "consequence", "velocity", "risk_type",
    "inherent_risk", "residual_risk", "risk_response",
    "controls": [{ "control", "effectiveness" }]
  }
}
```
404 not_found

item.description:
**Step 7.** Score risks job → read assessment.

Requires Azure OpenAI configured.

request.description:
## Purpose
Portal: persist user-selected risks to `risks` table.

## Response 200
ApiResponse with created risk ids.

## Response 200
ApiResponse with array of RiskResponse in `data`.

item.name: 09 Risk Tagging (Stage 09)
item.description:
Stage 09 — enrich the risk register with business metadata (process, function, department, KPI, region, control family).

Flow: **List untagged → Run tagging (JOB) → Poll job → List recommendations → Apply selected → KPIs**.

Recommendations carry confidence, rationale and evidence; a human reviewer applies them before they become official (human-in-the-loop). Catalogs are bootstrapped from Business Demography on first run. Control-family taxonomy follows ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A + an AI & Model Governance family aligned to the MIT AI Risk Repository (https://airisk.mit.edu/navigator#/risks/browse).

request.description:
## Purpose
Work queue for the tagging stage: risks with no or incomplete required tags (`process`, `function`, `kpi`).

## Response 200
Array of risks with `tag_status` (`untagged` | `partially_tagged`) and `missing_dimensions`.

## Errors
401 UNAUTHORIZED · 403 FORBIDDEN · 404 CLIENT_ORG_NOT_FOUND · 422 validation_error

Read-only: never mutates data.

## Purpose
Starts the `risk_tagging` background job. Matches each eligible risk against the organisation catalogs (deterministic lexical matching + optional LLM refinement with fallback) and stores recommendations with confidence, rationale and evidence.

## Response 202
```json
{ "status": "accepted", "data": { "job_id": "…", "type": "risk_tagging", "risks_queued": 42, "processing_status": "in_progress" } }
```

Poll `GET /jobs/{{jobId}}` until `completed`.

## Errors
400 NO_ELIGIBLE_RISKS · 404 CATALOG_NOT_FOUND · 409 JOB_ALREADY_RUNNING · 422 INVALID_TAG_DIMENSION

Auto-apply is **off by default**; high-confidence auto-apply only when `auto_apply: true` and confidence ≥ `confidence_threshold`.
Poll until `status` = `completed` | `failed`. `payload.progress` shows live counters: `risks_total`, `risks_processed`, `tags_proposed`, `tags_applied`, `needs_review`.

## Purpose
Review screen data: proposed/applied/needs_review/rejected tags with per-tag confidence, rationale and evidence (`risk_title`, `linked_issue`, `control_text`, …).

**Run this immediately before "Apply selected risk tags".** The Tests script reads the catalog ids from the first actionable recommendation and stores them in `applySelectedTagsPayload`, which the Apply request then sends — so you never paste UUIDs by hand.

Optional filters: `risk_id`, `status` (enable the disabled `status` query param to filter by `proposed` / `applied` / `needs_review` / `rejected`).

## Errors
404 RISK_NOT_FOUND · 422 INVALID_STATUS

exec: console.warn('No tag recommendations — check clientOrgId and run the tagging job first');

request.description:
## Purpose
Human-in-the-loop control point: writes analyst-approved tags to the official risk register and stores reviewer identity + timestamp.

**Run "List risk tag recommendations" immediately before this request.** The Pre-request Script replaces the body with `applySelectedTagsPayload` (real catalog ids pulled from the recommendation), so the placeholder body below is only a fallback for manual edits.

`replace_existing: true` (per risk) replaces a dimension instead of merging.

## Response 200
`data.updated` / `data.skipped` / `data.needs_review`.

## Errors
404 RISK_NOT_FOUND · 404 TAG_REFERENCE_NOT_FOUND · 409 TAG_ALREADY_APPLIED

exec: throw new Error('Run "List risk tag recommendations" first — it builds applySelectedTagsPayload');
throw new Error('applySelectedTagsPayload is not valid JSON — re-run List risk tag recommendations');
throw new Error('No risk_id in applySelectedTagsPayload — re-run List risk tag recommendations');
console.warn('No catalog ids found for risk ' + item.risk_id + ' — the recommendation had no tags to apply');
pm.request.body.update({ mode: 'raw', raw: payload, options: { raw: { language: 'json' } } });
console.log('Already applied — this risk already has these tags (expected for re-runs).');

request.description:
## Purpose
Tagging-health dashboard: `fully_tagged`, `partially_tagged`, `untagged`, `needs_review`, `tagging_completion_percentage`, and `missing_dimensions` per dimension (process/function/kpi/region). Completion is computed against required dimensions.

item.name: 10 Risk Owner Assignment (Stage 10)
item.description:
Stage 10 — recommend and assign accountable owners using risk tags + the organisation hierarchy snapshot.

Flow: **List unassigned → Read hierarchy → Run assignment (JOB) → Poll job → List recommendations → Apply selected → KPIs**.

Owner matching is a transparent weighted model (KPI owner 0.35, process owner 0.30, function 0.20, department 0.10, region 0.10, management-level fit 0.05) per ISO 31000 risk-ownership and the IIA Three Lines Model. Low-confidence matches stay `needs_review`.

request.description:
## Purpose
Work queue for owner assignment: risks with `owner_user_id = null` (plus partially assigned ones when `include_partially_assigned=true`).

Read-only: never assigns owners.

## Purpose
Trusted reference list for owner matching: users with title, function, department, region, management level, reporting line and ownership metadata (`function_owner`, `process_owner`, `kpi_owner`, `risk_admin`).

Uses the latest **approved** snapshot (auto-bootstrapped from registered users + catalog owners on first call). Pass `snapshot_id` to read a specific snapshot.

## Errors
404 CLIENT_ORG_NOT_FOUND · 404 HIERARCHY_NOT_FOUND

## Purpose
Starts the `risk_owner_assignment` background job. Scores every active hierarchy user per risk using tagged context and proposes the best owner plus up to two alternates with confidence, `matched_on`, and plain-English rationale.

## Response 202
`data.job_id`, `risks_queued`, `processing_status`.

## Errors
400 NO_UNASSIGNED_RISKS · 404 HIERARCHY_NOT_FOUND · 409 JOB_ALREADY_RUNNING · 422 validation_error · 424 RISK_TAGGING_REQUIRED

Inactive users are ignored unless `include_inactive_users: true`. Low-confidence matches are kept as `needs_review`, never auto-assigned.
Poll until `status` = `completed` | `failed`. `payload.progress` counters: `risks_total`, `risks_processed`, `owners_proposed`, `auto_assigned`, `needs_review`, `no_owner_found`.

## Purpose
Review screen data: recommended owner (full attributes, not just the id), alternates, confidence, `matched_on` evidence, and rationale.

Optional filters: `risk_id`, `status` (`proposed` | `assigned` | `needs_review` | `rejected`).

## Errors
404 RISK_NOT_FOUND · 422 INVALID_STATUS

## Purpose
Human approval control point: records the accountable owner on the official risk register with reviewer identity + timestamp.

Optional: `accountable_user_id`, `assignment_type` (`primary_owner` | `accountable_owner` | `delegate` | `alternate_owner`), `replace_existing: true` to replace an existing owner.

## Response 200
`data.assigned` / `data.skipped` / `data.needs_review`.

## Errors
404 RISK_NOT_FOUND · 404 OWNER_NOT_FOUND · 409 OWNER_ALREADY_ASSIGNED

## Purpose
Ownership-coverage dashboard: tagging block, assignment block (`assigned`/`proposed`/`needs_review`/`unassigned`, completion %), and `high_priority_gaps` (`high_rated_unassigned`, `critical_process_untagged`, `missing_kpi_mapping`). Proposed assignments are counted separately from official owners.

item.name: 11 Fetch Latest Data (re-run while jobs run)

```json
{ "id", "document_id", "client_org_id", "control_text", "section_ref", "framework", "source_page", "created_at" }
```

## Response 200

## Purpose

item.description: **Read APIs** — poll DB while jobs run (vs poll job = worker status).

request.description:
Register PDFs from disk into documents table.

## Response 200
`{ scanned, added, updated, skipped, errors }`
Single DocumentResponse. 404 not_found

exec: const b=pm.response.json(); const id=b.id||(b.data&&b.data.job_id); if(id) pm.collectionVariables.set('jobId',id);
